Anyone - including individuals and organizations - can nominate a topic for the U.S. Preventive Services Task Force (USPSTF) to consider for evaluation for a future recommendation. To nominate a topic:
Read the information below about the USPSTF and how it chooses topics for its recommendations. Complete one of the Topic Nomination Forms below. The USPSTF The USPSTF is a Congressionally mandated, scientifically independent panel of medical experts in primary care and prevention composed of primary care providers-internists, pediatricians, family physicians, gynecologists/obstetricians, nurses, and health behavior specialists-who are c
